title: aslTranslate
summary: 2025 KHE Hackathon overall winner. This project is a web application that breaks ASL down to it's core aspects to neatly organize a library of guestures and words. It allows for the searching of signs based on entered parameters such as hand shape, movement, location, etc.
impact: Assisted in creating a backend with Express and node.js and implemented MySQL as a database.
details: Gained deeper understanding of MySQL server architecture and remote database implementation.
Implemented search functionality to allow users to find ASL signs based on various parameters.
Integrated database functionality with frontend components.
